---
title: "Tidying and Wrangling"
format: html
---
```{r}
#| message: false
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
```

# Data Sources

## Read in our data

```{r}
#| message: false
catch_original <- read_csv("https://knb.ecoinformatics.org/knb/d1/mn/v2/object/df35b.302.1")
```

## Explore

```{r}
colnames(catch_original)
head(catch_original)
summary(catch_original)
unique(catch_original$Region)

```
# Cleaning and Reshaping

## Using the select() function

```{r}
# Select() to keep the columns wanted
catch_data<-catch_original %>% 
  select(Region, Year, Chinook, Sockeye, Coho, Pink, Chum)
head(catch_data)
#dropping unwanted columns
catch_data<-catch_original %>% 
  select(-All, -notesRegCode)
head(catch_data)
```
## check column types

```{r}
glimpse(catch_data)
```
## Changing column contents with mutate()
```{r}
#change chinook column to numeric
catch_clean<-catch_data %>% 
  mutate(Chinook=as.numeric(Chinook))
```
```{r}
is.na(catch_clean$Chinook)
#get location where NA value is
i<-which(is.na(catch_clean$Chinook))
i
#looking at row in data
catch_data[i,]
#using mutate to fix
catch_clean<-catch_data %>% 
  mutate(Chinook=if_else(condition=Chinook=="I",
    true="1",
    false=Chinook),
    Chinook=as.numeric(Chinook))
head(catch_clean)
catch_clean[i,]
```
## Changing file shape using pivot_longer() and pivot_wider()
```{r}
catch_long<-catch_clean %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols=-c(Region, Year),
               names_to="species",
               values_to="catch")
head(catch_long)

catch_wide<-catch_long %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from=species,
               values_from=catch)
head(catch_wide)
```
## rename columns with rename()
```{r}
catch_long<-catch_long %>% 
  rename(catch_thousands=catch)
head(catch_long)
```
```{r}
catch_long<-catch_long %>% 
  mutate(catch=catch_thousands*1000) %>% 
  select(-catch_thousands)
head(catch_long)
```
## summary statistics using group_by and summarize()
```{r}
mean_region<-catch_long %>% 
  group_by(Region) %>% 
  summarize(mean_catch=mean(catch))
head(mean_region)
#number of rows for each group
n_region<-catch_clean %>% 
  group_by(Region) %>% 
  summarize(n=n())
head(n_region)
```
## Filtering rows using filter()
```{r}
sse_catch<-catch_long %>% 
  filter(Region=="SSE")
head(sse_catch)

catch_million<-catch_long %>% 
  filter(catch>1000000)
head(catch_million)

chinook_sse<-catch_long %>% 
  filter(Region=="SSE" & species=="Chinook")
head(chinook_sse)

chinook_sse<-catch_long %>% 
  filter(Region=="SSE" & species=="Chinook")
head(chinook_sse)
```
## Sorting data with arrange()
```{r}
mean_region<-catch_long %>% 
  group_by(Region) %>% 
  summarize(mean_catch=mean(catch)) %>% 
  arrange(mean_catch)
head(mean_region)

mean_region<-catch_long %>% 
  group_by(Region) %>% 
  summarize(mean_catch=mean(catch)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(mean_catch))
head(mean_region)
```
## Combining datasets with join()
```{r}
region_defs <- read.csv("https://knb.ecoinformatics.org/knb/d1/mn/v2/object/df35b.303.1") %>% 
    select(code, mgmtArea)

head(region_defs)
catch_joined<-left_join(catch_long, region_defs, by=c("Region"="code"))
head(catch_joined)
```
```{r}
region_defs <- read.csv("https://knb.ecoinformatics.org/knb/d1/mn/v2/object/df35b.303.1") %>% 
    select(code, mgmtArea) %>% 
  rename(Region=code, Region_Name=mgmtArea)
catch_joined<-left_join(catch_long, region_defs, by=c("Region"))
head(catch_joined)
```
## split and combine values in columns

```{r}
sites_df<-data.frame(site=c("HAW-101",
                            "HAW-103",
                            "OAH-320"))
head(sites_df)
split_df<-sites_df %>% 
  separate(site,c("island","site_numer"), sep="-")
head(split_df)
```
```{r}
dates_df<-data.frame(year=c("1930",
                            "1930",
                            "1932"),
                     month=c("12","12","12"),
                     day="14","15","16")
head(dates_df)
dates_unite<-dates_df %>% 
  unite(col=date, year, month, day, sep="-")
head(dates_unite)
```
```{r}
mean_region<-catch_original %>% 
  select(-All, -notesRegCode) %>% 
  mutate(Chinook=if_else(Chinook=="I",
         "1",
         Chinook)) %>% 
  mutate(Chinook=as.numeric(Chinook)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(Region, Year),
               names_to = "species",
               values_to="catch") %>% 
  mutate(catch=catch*1000) %>% 
  group_by(Region) %>% 
  summarize(mean_catch=mean(catch)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(mean_catch))
head(mean_region)
```
## save results with write_csv()
```{r}
library(here)
write_csv(mean_region, here("data/mean_catch_by_region.csv"))
```
